Teaching

Courses

Courses in digital systems, computer engineering, and cyber-physical systems at Universitas Indonesia.

ENCE3xx

Digital System Design

Logic design, combinational and sequential circuits, FPGA-based implementation and verification.

CE Junior

Computer Engineering Junior Seminar

Introduction to research methods, technical writing, and key topics in computer engineering.

ENCE4xx

Asynchronous Circuit Design

Principles of delay-insensitive and asynchronous logic, Petri nets, and verification techniques.

ENCE3yy

Computer Design Lab

Microprocessor architecture, assembly programming, interfacing, and embedded system experiments.

ENCE5xx

Engineering Genetic Circuits

Synthetic biology principles applied to genetic circuit modeling and computational design tools.

ENCE6xx

Verification of Cyber-Physical Systems

Formal methods, model checking, and runtime verification for safety-critical CPS applications.

Cyber-Physical Resilient & Intelligent Systems
